description.overview: A true companion breed from Italy, the Bolognese is a calm, devoted little dog with a fluffy white coat. They're less yappy than many toy breeds.
description.temperament: Known for being devoted, playful, calm.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, fluffy, cotton-like coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A true companion breed from Italy, the Bolognese is a calm, devoted little dog with a fluffy white coat. They're less yappy than many toy breeds.
